description: Stores error records from Power Automate agent flows for monitoring and diagnostics. Each row represents one flow error occurrence.

columns.description: Primary key. Auto-generated GUID for each error record.
Name of the Power Automate flow that generated the error.
Full error message and stack trace captured from the flow run.
ID of the AssistantCard record affected by this error, if applicable.
Which step in the flow failed. Populated from the flow run context.
Whether this error has been investigated and resolved by an admin.
columns._naming_note: Recommended name: cr_isresolved (cr_is* prefix convention). Not renamed to avoid breaking existing flow and dashboard references.

notes.design_rationale: UserOwned table for row-level security consistency with all other tables in the solution. Admin visibility is granted via security roles rather than Organization ownership.
notes.security: Table uses UserOwned ownership type. Row-level security is enforced via an ownership-based security role, consistent with the rest of the solution. Admin security roles grant broad read access for monitoring.
notes.system_columns: Standard Dataverse system columns (createdon, modifiedon, statecode, statuscode) are created automatically and do not need to be defined here.
